test-strategy-bootstrap.name: test-strategy-bootstrap
test-strategy-bootstrap.description: Fix broken test_config import path (single-edit unblock), expand profile_manager test coverage, add CLI/daemon smoke tests, retire fake-print test files

action_steps.title: Fix test_config import path
action_steps.detail: Replace 'from server.config.profile_manager import ProfileManager' with 'from shared.profile_manager import ProfileManager' at server/tests/test_config.py lines 92, 108, 126, 139. Single-edit unblock for pytest collection.

action_steps.title: Expand profile_manager test coverage
action_steps.detail: After test_config.py imports work, add cases for greeting round-trip, defaults overlay merging (dict_keys phantom-read pattern at lines 327-334), and singleton reset/teardown semantics. shared/profile_manager.py is the most-imported module — highest leverage.

action_steps.title: Add CLI smoke tests
action_steps.detail: Factor argparse subcommand bodies into testable functions in cli/ (depends on cli-split-and-helpers cluster). Pytest-monkeypatch subprocess.run/network_utils to verify dispatch decisions per top-level subcommand (talky daemon, talky profile, talky openclaw, talky say, talky ask).

action_steps.title: Add daemon integration test
action_steps.detail: Construct a VoiceChannel against pipecat fakes; exercise attach/detach, profile switch via ManuallySwitchServiceFrame, FastMCP tool dispatch. Verifies the soft-switch invariant the architecture rests on.

action_steps.title: Retire fake-print test files
action_steps.detail: Three test_*.py files have no assertions. Either rename to scripts/ (smoke_backends.py, etc.) or rewrite as pytest tests. Pick one backend (moltis is simpler) for a real fake-websocket connect/handshake/cleanup test.

legacy-shim-deletion-sweep.name: legacy-shim-deletion-sweep
legacy-shim-deletion-sweep.description: Delete dead modules with zero in-tree callers: server/tts_daemon.py, server/backends/base.py, eager profile_manager singleton, legacy_daemon_is_running predicate, create_pi_service factory, AsyncGenerator import

action_steps.title: Delete server/tts_daemon.py
action_steps.detail: Pure 26-line re-export with zero in-tree importers (verified). Delete file. Update voice_config.py docstring that mentions tts_daemon. Covers tts_daemon_orphan_shim and tts_daemon_shim (same defect, two dimensions).

action_steps.title: Delete server/backends/base.py and dependent test
action_steps.detail: BaseLLMBackend, BackendManager, mixins, singleton — zero non-test consumers. Delete server/backends/base.py and server/tests/test_backends.py (or rewrite test against actual exported services). Subsumes orphan_backend_base_layer, dead_backend_abstraction, and unused_async_generator_import (the AsyncGenerator import lives only in this dead file).

action_steps.title: Delete eager profile_manager singleton
action_steps.detail: Remove 'profile_manager = get_profile_manager()' at shared/profile_manager.py:475 plus its 'Backwards compat' comment. All consumers already use the getter — verified zero callers of the module-level instance. Removes filesystem I/O from import path.

action_steps.title: Delete dead helpers and unused factories
action_steps.detail: Inline cleanup logic from legacy_daemon_is_running into voice_daemon startup, then drop the predicate. Delete create_pi_service factory at server/backends/pi.py:116 (no callers — instantiate PiLLMService directly if needed).

action_steps.title: Removal-or-migrate gate for stalled legacy shims
action_steps.detail: For each remaining legacy path (LEGACY_* constants in shared/daemon_protocol.py, /api/profile compat route): confirm zero in-tree callers and delete, OR add a tracked removal ticket with sunset date. /api/profile route lives in mislabelled_legacy_profile_route (handled in channel-and-server-decomposition cluster). Run 'desloppify autofix unused-imports --dry-run' from auto/unused cluster as a side-effect cleanup.

shared-package-and-syspath.name: shared-package-and-syspath
shared-package-and-syspath.description: Promote shared/ to a real workspace member, drop sys.path inserts, hoist deferred profile_manager imports, collapse duplicate daemon_is_running names, fold profile_manager triple-branch construction, address module-level http session cache, disambiguate TalkyProfile fields

action_steps.title: Promote shared/ to workspace member
action_steps.detail: Add shared/ to pyproject.toml tool.uv.workspace.members as 'talky-shared' (or similar). Both server/ and mcp-server/ depend on it. Removes the boundary fiction.

action_steps.title: Drop sys.path.insert in production code
action_steps.detail: After shared/ becomes a package, replace every module-scope sys.path.insert with normal imports. Centralize any remaining bootstrap in conftest.py only. Touches CLI, daemon, mcp-server. Subsumes mcp_server_syspath_boundary and syspath_insert_pattern.

action_steps.title: Hoist deferred profile_manager imports
action_steps.detail: channel.py defers 'from shared.profile_manager import ...' 9x inside methods. Hoist to module scope. If a real cycle exists, extract LLMBackend dataclass to leaf profile_types.py and import that. Function-level imports become exception-with-comment, not 9x pattern.

action_steps.title: Disambiguate daemon_is_running and TalkyProfile fields
action_steps.detail: Rename to voice_daemon_is_running() in shared/daemon_protocol.py and talky_daemon_is_running() in daemon_bridge.py/talky_cli.py. Decide TalkyProfile.backend vs llm_backend semantics: rename to clarify (e.g. backend_type, backend_id) or collapse. Drop Legacy/New comments.

action_steps.title: Move http session cache and consolidate config logic
action_steps.detail: Move module-level _http_sessions dict onto VoiceChannel/lifespan state object. Refactor profile_manager._load_llm_backends triple-branch construction into a two-stage merge with deep-merge helpers + single LLMBackend(**config) loop. Same shape for voice backends. Tighten talkyprofile_optional_to_required_str by guarding in resolve_talky_profile or splitting into raw vs resolved dataclass. Add port_holder_lookup_duplicated: shared/network_utils.find_pids_listening(port) used by talky_cli and server.py.

services-factory-unification.name: services-factory-unification
services-factory-unification.description: Collapse to one factory in shared/, delete mcp-server services_factory wrapper, add from-e chaining and return annotations, fix singular/plural naming drift

action_steps.title: Collapse to one factory in shared/
action_steps.detail: Have mcp-server callers import from shared.service_factory directly. Delete mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/services_factory.py wrapper (which also has the broken config.profile_manager reference and sys.path hack). Rename if needed to keep singular form consistent.

action_steps.title: Drop dead create_services_from_profile
action_steps.detail: Function references nonexistent config.profile_manager. Logic duplicated by channel.py pipeline build. Delete the function.

action_steps.title: Add return annotations and from-e chaining
action_steps.detail: Annotate factory return types: -> Any acceptable for dynamic-import factories; -> SileroVADAnalyzer for create_vad_analyzer (or inline as part of trivial_vad_wrapper in small-fixes-batch); Optional[str] params on create_tts_for_profile. Add 'from e' on both ValueError raises in services_factory so user-facing setup errors preserve underlying cause.

channel-and-server-decomposition.name: channel-and-server-decomposition
channel-and-server-decomposition.description: Split mcp-server/server.py (846 LOC) into routes/tools/lifespan/server, extract pipeline build helpers in channel.py and voice_daemon._do_listen, extract _read_room_setting helper, move _http_sessions onto channel/lifespan, decide /api/profile route migration vs deletion

action_steps.title: Split mcp-server/server.py into modules
action_steps.detail: 846 LOC → tools.py (MCP tool defs), routes.py (Starlette routes incl. /api/profile compat decision), lifespan.py (startup/shutdown + force-takeover), thin server.py wiring. Pre-warmed VoiceChannel ownership stays on app state. Move FastMCP/VoiceChannel construction into a build_app() factory called from lifespan startup, eliminating import-time side effects (server_module_import_side_effects).

action_steps.title: Decompose _build_and_start_pipeline
action_steps.detail: Extract from channel.py: _build_llm_switcher(pm) -> (LLMSwitcher, profile_map), _build_voice_pipeline(...) -> (Pipeline, PipelineTask), _attach_lifecycle_handlers, _attach_pong_responder, _wire_transport_lifecycle. Internal phases are already commented as separate sections — promote comments into method boundaries. Keep 30-line orchestrator. Subsumes build_pipeline_method_size and build_pipeline_mixed_responsibilities.

action_steps.title: Decompose voice_daemon._do_listen
action_steps.detail: Extract _build_listen_pipeline(stt) -> (PipelineTask, result_holder) and _run_with_timeouts(task, silence_timeout, listen_timeout, speech_started_flag) -> bool. _do_listen becomes: build, play start tone, run-with-timeouts, play stop tone, package result. Two timeouts as separate helpers.

action_steps.title: Extract _read_room_setting helper
action_steps.detail: Define _read_room_setting(env_key, yaml_key, *, default, allow_infinity, clamp_floor) in lifespan.py or shared. Both server.py settings readers collapse to one-line wrappers. Centralizes env-vs-yaml precedence so future settings inherit it.

action_steps.title: Move _http_sessions and decide /api/profile
action_steps.detail: Drop module-level _http_sessions dict; pass session as constructor arg or own via lifespan context manager. Eliminates loop-binding surprises. Decide /api/profile route: keep as canonical (drop /api/profiles* handlers) OR migrate talky_cli to /api/profiles/switch shape and delete /api/profile. Pick one and document next to routes.py.

cli-split-and-helpers.name: cli-split-and-helpers
cli-split-and-helpers.description: Create cli/ package, split talky_cli.py (931 LOC) by subcommand group, factor _daemon_get/_daemon_post/_resolve_daemon_env helpers, collapse cmd_pi/cmd_claude duplication, drop inner-class Args copypaste

action_steps.title: Create cli/ package and split talky_cli.py
action_steps.detail: Move 931 LOC into cli/ package: cli/profile.py, cli/daemon.py, cli/say.py, cli/auth.py, cli/config.py + cli/__main__.py thin dispatcher. Fold talky_auth.py contents in. Keep entry-point binding in pyproject.toml unchanged.

action_steps.title: Extract HTTP and env helpers
action_steps.detail: Add _daemon_get(path) -> dict and _daemon_post(path, body) -> dict in cli/_http.py raising typed CliError that callers print. Add _resolve_daemon_env() in shared/daemon_env.py centralizing TALKY_DAEMON_*/TALKY_MCP_* alias fallback (currently duplicated 4x in talky_cli). Scheme-guard urllib (covers auto/security-B310 supersede). Removes ~60 lines and centralizes the CLI<->daemon HTTP seam.

action_steps.title: Collapse cmd_pi/cmd_claude duplication
action_steps.detail: Replace inner Args classes with args.profile = 'pi'/'claude' and call cmd_run_client_profile(args). Or factor _run_named_app_profile(args, profile_name) and have both call it.

package-restructure.name: package-restructure
package-restructure.description: Flatten server/features/, consolidate /server/scripts/ into root /scripts/, address inverted server/ package role and protocol drift in server/backends/ siblings via naming/docs (not new abstraction)

action_steps.title: Flatten server/features/
action_steps.detail: git mv server/features/voice_switcher.py server/voice_switcher.py; rmdir server/features/. Update ~3 importers. Subsumes thin_features_package and single_occupant_features_dir (same defect, two dimensions).

action_steps.title: Consolidate scripts directories
action_steps.detail: git mv server/scripts/kill_opencv.sh scripts/kill-opencv.sh; git mv server/scripts/README.md scripts/README.md; rmdir server/scripts. Normalize hyphenated naming. No code import updates needed.

action_steps.title: Address inverted server/ package role
action_steps.detail: Stage a reorg: git mv server/transcribe.py server/stt/transcribe.py; group tts files under server/tts/; group voice_client.py + voice_daemon.py + say_command.py under server/voice/; keep logging_config.py at server root. After each move run 'rg -l' for old import paths and update. Validate with ruff/pyright/pytest.

action_steps.title: Document backends sibling protocol
action_steps.detail: Don't add an abstraction layer — name the difference. Either rename PiLLMService to PiSubprocessRunner and place outside backends/, or add a top-of-file comment in backends/__init__.py documenting that pi is a subprocess-runner sibling, not a Pipecat LLMService.

websocket-backend-base.name: websocket-backend-base
websocket-backend-base.description: Extract WebsocketLLMBackendBase from Moltis/OpenClaw, normalize handle_messages, remove magic-byte v2 dup, single finally for _process_user_text, narrow moltis debug log, collapse session-key dead branches, add from-e chaining in OpenClaw raises

action_steps.title: Extract WebsocketLLMBackendBase
action_steps.detail: New base in server/backends/ws_base.py owning websocket lifecycle, response queue, request-id generation. Moltis and OpenClaw override only connect handshake and message-event parsing. Cuts ~150 lines of duplicated boilerplate.

action_steps.title: Clean up OpenClaw message handling
action_steps.detail: Initialise self._accumulated_response = None in __init__ (drop hasattr/delattr). Extract _enqueue_response(text) wrapping put_nowait/QueueFull pattern. Collapse type=='res' branches. Use single try/finally in _process_user_text emitting LLMFullResponseStartFrame/EndFrame, inner try/except only for queue.get. Add 'from e' to all re-raises in except blocks; signal connection-loss via sentinel exception on response_queue. Subsumes openclaw_handle_messages_sprawl, openclaw_process_user_text_double_end_frame, openclaw_raise_without_from.

action_steps.title: Delete OpenClaw v2 device-auth
action_steps.detail: Delete build_device_auth (v2). Extract _ed25519_public_key_b64url(pem: str) -> str helper for SPKI extraction so constants/fallback live in one place. Remove function-level cryptography imports (module-level imports cover both).

action_steps.title: Clean up Moltis branches and logs
action_steps.detail: Collapse _generate_session_key to mapping {'persistent': lambda: ..., 'daily': lambda: ...} with default 'persistent'. Merge identical 'per-connection' and 'new' branches. Narrow chat-event debug log to keys/lengths only ('state', len(payload.get('text', ''))); gate full payload behind TRACE flag or remove. Subsumes moltis_generate_session_key_dead_branches and moltis_full_payload_debug_dump.

voice-switcher-consolidation.name: voice-switcher-consolidation
voice-switcher-consolidation.description: Extract single VoiceProfileSwitcher.apply_profile, slim switcher to still-used surface (delete RTVI-era handlers), iterate (close,shutdown) with shared try/except

action_steps.title: Extract VoiceProfileSwitcher.apply_profile
action_steps.detail: Single method handling same-vs-cross-provider work and frame queueing, raising ValueError/RuntimeError on failure modes. RTVI handler, public switch_profile, and channel.switch_voice all call apply_profile and translate exceptions for their callers. Subsumes voice_switcher_decision_tree_triplication and voice_switcher_dual_state_machine.

action_steps.title: Slim VoiceProfileSwitcher and dedupe cleanup
action_steps.detail: Delete handle_message, _handle_get_voice_profiles, _handle_get_current_voice_profile, _handle_set_voice_profile, switch_profile (RTVI-era code). Keep tts_service_map construction, ServiceSwitcher build, current_profile tracking. Cleanup: iterate ('close', 'shutdown') with single try/except (or _safe_call(svc, method_name) helper).

action_steps.title: Verify with smoke test
action_steps.detail: After consolidation lands, manually exercise voice profile switching from CLI (talky voice <profile>) and from a connected browser peer. Confirm no regressions in same-provider vs cross-provider paths and that close/shutdown cleanup runs once per service.

mcp-tool-contract-unification.name: mcp-tool-contract-unification
mcp-tool-contract-unification.description: Pick one envelope ({success, error?, ...payload}), apply to convo_speak/switch_profile/switch_voice, document at top of tools.py

action_steps.title: Adopt {success, error, payload} envelope
action_steps.detail: Pick one envelope: always return {'success': bool, 'error'?: str, ...payload}; let truly unexpected exceptions propagate. Apply to convo_speak (currently bool), switch_profile, switch_voice. Document at top of tools.py (created in channel-and-server-decomposition cluster).

action_steps.title: Document and apply error contract
action_steps.detail: Update switch_profile/switch_voice docstrings with explicit Returns section showing both branches. Decide rule for any remaining tools (control-plane returns error dicts vs data-plane raises) and document next to definitions. Subsumes switch_tools_silent_error_dict, switch_profile_silent_error, mcp_tool_error_contract_split.

dependency-trim.name: dependency-trim
dependency-trim.description: Drop unused rich, unused requests/httpx in mcp-server, align pipecat-ai pin to ==0.0.102 across workspace, narrow pipecat-ai extras, demote kokoro-onnx to optional

action_steps.title: Drop unused root deps
action_steps.detail: Remove 'rich>=13.0.0' from pyproject.toml (no imports). Remove 'requests' and 'httpx' from mcp-server/pyproject.toml runtime deps (no imports — pipecat's transitive deps cover any indirect needs).

action_steps.title: Align pipecat-ai pin and trim extras
action_steps.detail: Set mcp-server pipecat-ai constraint to ==0.0.102 (matching root). Trim pipecat-ai extras to subset actually required by daemon core (likely runner, silero, webrtc). Provider SDKs delegate to root-level optional extras + lazy installer.

action_steps.title: Demote kokoro-onnx to optional
action_steps.detail: Move kokoro-onnx into an optional dependency group on mcp-server (or drop it entirely; lazy installer pulls pipecat-ai[kokoro] when profile activates). Users who never run kokoro skip the ONNX runtime weight.

small-fixes-batch.name: small-fixes-batch
small-fixes-batch.description: Trivial typed-tedium and small cleanups bundled into one PR: Optional[str] annotations, Pi NoReturn, dict[str, Any] daemon protocol, narrow bare except, drop unused imports, inline trivial wrappers, drop spurious async, consolidate __future__ imports, add fallback warning log

action_steps.title: Type annotation tightening
action_steps.detail: Change openclaw.py three signatures from 'param: str = None' to Optional[str]. Annotate PiLLMService.send_message as -> NoReturn (or delete the method — Pi backend has its own UI). Annotate daemon_protocol send_message/recv_message as dict[str, Any] (or define TypedDict if envelope stable). Subsumes openclaw_optional_str_lies, pi_send_message_return_type_lie, daemon_protocol_bare_dict.

action_steps.title: Remove spurious async and inline trivial wrappers
action_steps.detail: Drop async on shared/client_launcher.py methods that never await (or replace blocking calls with asyncio variants — pick one). Drop async on OpenClawLLMService._clear_pending_responses. Inline create_vad_analyzer at its 2-3 callers and delete the wrapper. Inline get_listen_start_tone/get_listen_stop_tone or assign module-level LISTEN_START_PCM constants. Collapse _greeting_for_profile/_signoff_for_profile into _profile_string_attr(profile_name, attr). Subsumes spurious_async_client_launcher, spurious_async_openclaw_clear, trivial_vad_wrapper, trivial_tone_wrappers, near_duplicate_profile_field_lookups.

action_steps.title: Error consistency cleanups
action_steps.detail: Narrow logging_config bare except to 'except Exception:' with logger.debug. Make close_http_sessions async (await from callers); keep sync best-effort shim if needed for non-async shutdown. Add logger.warning in available_profiles silent fallback path so empty-set is distinguishable in logs. Subsumes bare_except_logging_config, close_http_sessions_fire_and_forget, voice_channel_silent_profile_fallback.

action_steps.title: Misc trivial cleanups
action_steps.detail: Delete redundant 'import base64' on openclaw.py line 35 (module-level import covers it). Add 'from __future__ import annotations' to mcp-server services_factory.py and daemon_bridge.py (or remove from the others — pick one for uniform package style). Subsumes redundant_inline_base64_import and future_annotations_partial.

observe.report:
# Observe stage report

## Method
Sampled 12+ open review issues across the prioritized list and cross-checked the existing manual clusters in the plan against the open issues. The clusters already exist with the correct membership shape; the previous triage built them but did not promote them. Verification effort focuses on: (a) confirming representative issues are still real in current source, (b) verdict on auto-clusters, (c) sanity-check that the existing manual cluster groupings still hold.

## Per-issue spot checks (manual cluster representatives)

- review::.::holistic::high_level_elegance::monolithic_root_cli — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: talky_cli.py is 931 LOC at repo root with multiple cmd_* dispatchers mixed with helpers. files_read: talky_cli.py. recommendation: keep in cli-split-and-helpers cluster, promote.
- review::.::holistic::high_level_elegance::server_entry_point_mixed_concerns — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: mcp-server/.../server.py mixes Starlette routes, MCP tool registration, lifecycle, and profile API in one ~846 LOC file. files_read: mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/server.py. recommendation: keep in channel-and-server-decomposition cluster.
- review::.::holistic::cross_module_architecture::mcp_server_syspath_boundary — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: shared/ is consumed via sys.path inserts rather than a workspace package; recurring-pattern bucket. files_read: mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/server.py, shared/. recommendation: keep in shared-package-and-syspath cluster.
- review::.::holistic::cross_module_architecture::duplicate_services_factory_shim — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: two service-factory implementations (shared/service_factory.py and mcp-server/.../services_factory.py) with overlapping STT/TTS construction. files_read: shared/service_factory.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/services_factory.py. recommendation: services-factory-unification.
- review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::duplicated_ws_backend_plumbing — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: Moltis and OpenClaw share near-duplicate websocket scaffolding (connect, message handler, response queue, _next_id). files_read: server/backends/moltis.py, server/backends/openclaw.py. recommendation: websocket-backend-base.
- review::.::holistic::low_level_elegance::voice_switcher_decision_tree_triplication — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: same-vs-cross-provider switching logic implemented three times across handle_set_voice_profile, switch_profile, channel.switch_voice. files_read: server/features/voice_switcher.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/channel.py. recommendation: voice-switcher-consolidation.
- review::.::holistic::contract_coherence::openclaw_optional_str_lies — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: openclaw.py declares param: str = None instead of Optional[str] in three signatures. files_read: server/backends/openclaw.py. recommendation: small-fixes-batch.
- review::.::holistic::contract_coherence::pi_send_message_return_type_lie — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: PiLLMService.send_message annotated -> str but always raises NotImplementedError. files_read: server/backends/pi.py. recommendation: small-fixes-batch.
- review::.::holistic::dependency_health::unused_rich_dep — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: 'rich>=13.0.0' declared in root pyproject.toml; no callers in current tree. files_read: pyproject.toml. recommendation: dependency-trim.
- review::.::holistic::dependency_health::pipecat_pin_inconsistency — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: pipecat-ai pinned to ==0.0.102 in mcp-server but unpinned in root and unpinned mismatch causes tool/venv divergence. files_read: pyproject.toml, mcp-server/pyproject.toml. recommendation: dependency-trim.
- review::.::holistic::incomplete_migration::tts_daemon_orphan_shim — verdict: genuine. verdict_reasoning: server/tts_daemon.py wrapper has zero callers. files_read: server/tts_daemon.py. recommendation: covered by completed legacy-shim-deletion-sweep cluster — cross-check before promotion. If file still present, fold into small-fixes-batch.

# Reflect stage report

## Strategy

The 77 open review issues are already cleanly grouped into 11 manual clusters by the prior cycle. Recurring dimensions — high_level_elegance (7 open), incomplete_migration (7 open), low_level_elegance (8 open), cross_module_architecture (5 open), ai_generated_debt (5 open), contract_coherence (5 open), dependency_health (5 open), design_coherence (5 open), error_consistency (5 open), initialization_coupling (5 open), abstraction_fitness (4 open), convention_outlier (4 open), mid_level_elegance (4 open), api_surface_coherence (3 open), package_organization (3 open), type_safety (3 open), logic_clarity (2 open), naming_quality (1 open) — are addressed by the existing cluster structure. No re-clustering needed.

Strategy: keep all 11 manual clusters as-is, route each open issue into its existing cluster, permanently skip the auto/security and auto/unused buckets. Promote in this order to optimize score recovery:

# Sense-check stage report

## Verification

Cross-checked the 11 promoted manual clusters against the strategize/reflect/organize/enrich record for accuracy, structural integrity, and value.

### Accuracy
Every member issue ID in each cluster maps to a real, currently open review issue (verified via prioritized_ids list and cluster show). No skipped/wontfixed issues are referenced by step issue-refs. All step file paths reference files that exist on disk: server/backends/openclaw.py, server/backends/moltis.py, server/backends/pi.py, shared/profile_manager.py, shared/service_factory.py, shared/daemon_protocol.py, shared/client_launcher.py, shared/voice_config.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/server.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/channel.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/services_factory.py, mcp-server/src/pipecat_mcp_server/daemon_bridge.py, talky_cli.py, server/features/voice_switcher.py, server/voice_daemon.py, server/logging_config.py, server/tts_daemon.py, server/backends/base.py, pyproject.toml, mcp-server/pyproject.toml.

### Structure
- 77 review issues -> 11 manual clusters, 100% coverage, no duplicates.
- 46 steps total, consistently below the 77-issue count (good consolidation).
- One dependency edge: services-factory-unification depends on shared-package-and-syspath. No other cross-cluster dependencies needed because each cluster owns a distinct file area.
- Effort distribution: 18 trivial, 14 small, 9 medium, 5 large — appropriately skewed toward cheap wins early in the queue.

### Value
- Score-recovery target: small-fixes-batch's 13 trivial fixes hit Code-quality (declining), Type-safety, Contracts, Error-consistency in one PR — direct counter to the 0.6-point slide.
- Architectural clusters (#27 - #66) target the four worst-headroom subjective dimensions (Cross-module-arch 58.0, Init-coupling 62.0, High-elegance 64.0, Stale-migration 68.0).
- Auto-cluster wontfix decisions reviewed: bandit B101/B104/B108/B603 patterns are intentional and not real defects; auto/unused was already partly handled by ruff and remaining items are subsumed by small-fixes-batch step 4; auto/test_coverage-* is covered by the recently completed test-strategy-bootstrap.

### Rework risk
- Avoid re-touching test-strategy-bootstrap and legacy-shim-deletion-sweep work this cycle. legacy-shim-deletion-sweep is queued last (#82) so it can be skipped if the prior cycle's work already removed the shims; will check at execution time.
- shared-package-and-syspath touches the same files (channel.py, profile_manager.py) as channel-and-server-decomposition; the dependency relation ensures shared lands first to avoid merge conflicts.

## Conclusion
Triage is internally consistent and ready to complete. Promotion order optimizes score recovery. No contradictions, no orphan issues, no value traps.
